visual_description: A man in a dark shirt is seen holding a white, crumpled object close to his face, partially obscuring it. He stands in front of a metal grid with a wavy pattern, looking slightly downward and to the side. His posture is hunched, and his hand grips the object tightly as he appears to be examining or interacting with it.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and a slow pace, accompanied by a gasp and a sigh.
